title: Slide 11: 3D SPHERES
prompt: Presentation slide 11: "3D SPHERES". A chart of 5 percentage values (10%, 20%, 30%, 40%, 50%). Geometric, axis-aligned. In 3D, lift to sphere fill-level gauges — one sphere per value, each filled to its percentage (the sphere-fill atom), equal radii so the FILL carries the value on a stage with the title floating above — corporate keynote aesthetic, not naturalistic.
